HDFC Equity Fund is a large-cap equity scheme that invests primarily in large-cap companies with a focus on long-term capital appreciation. It follows a growth-oriented investment style and aims to generate returns by investing in a diversified portfolio of large-cap stocks. The fund's primary goal is to generate returns through long-term capital appreciation.

https://www.hdfcfund.com
The AUM of HDFC Flexi Cap Fund is ₹100,479.23 Cr as of 30/04/26. See the official website for complete details: https://www.hdfcfund.com
